CustomField.formula: IF(Doctor__r.Monday__c,"Mon ","") & IF(Doctor__r.Tuesday__c,"Tue ","") & IF(Doctor__r.Wednesday__c,"Wed ","") & IF(Doctor__r.Thursday__c,"Thu ","") & IF(Doctor__r.Friday__c,"Fri ","") & IF(Doctor__r.Saturday__c,"Sat ","") & IF(Doctor__r.Sunday__c,"Sun ","")
CustomField.label: Days Doctor Available
